title: Midnight social media curfew and limits to infinite scrolling proposed for older UK teens
summary_full: The U.K. government has proposed new measures to protect older teens on social media, including a midnight curfew and a limit to infinite scrolling.
summary_public: The U.K. government has proposed new measures to protect older teens on social media, including a midnight curfew and a limit to infinite scrolling.
